query: Latest news on Tarik Skubal trade status Detroit Tigers as of July 2026. Has any trade been completed or agreed yet? What is the timing expectation - trade close to August 3 deadline or earlier?
answer:
## Summary

**No Tarik Skubal trade has been completed or agreed** as of the latest available reporting (freshest source dated July 9, 2026). He remains a Detroit Tiger and is the top storyline of the 2026 deadline.

**Key findings:**
- **Timing:** The 2026 MLB trade deadline is **August 3, 2026**. No imminent/early deal is indicated — any trade is expected **closer to the deadline** as Detroit uses July to decide whether to buy or sell.
- **Complicating factor:** Detroit was ~22-38 in early June (making a trade look "a lock"), but went ~19-12 since June 1 (among MLB's best), climbing to ~4 games out of the final AL wild-card spot. This has genuinely muddied the sell decision.
- **Skubal's stance:** Pending free agent (final contract year). Reportedly told friends he badly wants to stay in Detroit and has "zero appetite" to be traded; publicly urged the Tigers to be buyers.
- **Analyst read:** Still "more likely than not" to be traded per some reporters; one NL exec says he has "too much expiring value to hold." Speculative suitors: Dodgers, Yankees, Cubs, Brewers, Braves (Orioles named as a "dream" team lacking capital).
- **Caveat:** Real-time news feeds were unavailable, so developments after ~July 9 could not be confirmed.

The full report with sourcing and data points has been delivered via the structured output.

key_facts: No Tarik Skubal trade had been completed or agreed as of the latest reporting (July 9, 2026); he remains a Detroit Tiger.
The 2026 MLB trade deadline is August 3, 2026 (an off-day for the Tigers during a West Coast trip).
No imminent/early deal is indicated; any trade is expected to come closer to the Aug 3 deadline as Detroit evaluates buyer-vs-seller status through July.
Skubal is in the final year of his contract (pending free agent after 2026), making him the deadline's top trade chip.
Detroit's turnaround (~19-12 since June 1, among MLB's best) pulled them to roughly 4 games out of the final AL wild-card spot, complicating a potential sale.
Skubal reportedly told close friends he badly wants to stay in Detroit for 2026 and has 'zero appetite' to be traded; he has urged the Tigers to be buyers.
Analysts (Robert Murray) still consider a trade 'more likely than not,' while one NL executive said Skubal has 'too much expiring value to hold.'
Speculative suitors cited include the Dodgers, Yankees, Cubs, Brewers, and Braves; the Orioles were named as a 'dream' team lacking trade capital.
A Skubal trade is estimated to return a top-100 prospect, an organizational top-15 prospect, and more.
Real-time news feeds were unavailable; mid-to-late July 2026 developments could not be fully confirmed beyond July 9.

data_points.metric: Games out of final AL wild-card spot (improved position)
